JUDGE:VON BEROLDINGEN CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:GALLAGHER CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 7 (611). STIPULATION FOR FUTURE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF IF DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SURRENDER PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 11-30-98 IN BROOM CLEAN CONDTION AND DELIVER ALL KEYS. DEFENDANTS SHALL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE 996931 S.F.SUPERIOR COURT CASE BY 12-1-98. PLAIANTIFFS TO GET $10,000 FROM DEFENDANTS IN SUPERIOR COUIRT CASE. DEFENDANTS TO RECEIVE $3000 UPON SURRENDER OF PREMISES FROM TRUST FUND OF PLAINTIFF'S(CHENG). RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT ACCORDING TO LAW. ALL CASES BEFORE RENT BOARD ET AL. TO BE DISMISSED BY 8-30-98. NO CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION. IF CLAIM MADE,DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFFS FOR ALL COSTS AND FEES.WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS HAVING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARD BEFORE TRIAL AND WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT'S RIGHT TO HAVE DEPOSITONS OF TWO MATERIAL WITNESSES PRESENTLY UNDER SUB- POENA TO BE TAKEN BEFORE TRIAL.
